---
title: "Interactive Visualizations"
---

Three interactive visualizations from HW5. Each has a caption and a short written summary.

## Figure 1 — _TBD (e.g., interactive map)_

_Placeholder — embed plotly figure here._

**Caption.** _TBD._

**Summary.** _One short paragraph describing what the figure shows and the key takeaway._

---

## Figure 2 — _TBD (e.g., interactive histogram)_

_Placeholder — embed plotly figure here._

**Caption.** _TBD._

**Summary.** _One short paragraph describing what the figure shows and the key takeaway._

---

## Figure 3 — _TBD (e.g., interactive boxplot)_

_Placeholder — embed plotly figure here._

**Caption.** _TBD._

**Summary.** _One short paragraph describing what the figure shows and the key takeaway._
